subject: POTUS
body:
Jeffrey

Trump is expected to be in PBI
Dec 21st -Jan 6th

From Atlantic Aviaiton:
For your planning purposes, please be advised that PBI is expecting a Presidential TFR from December 21st until January 6th. As of this moment.

Sent from my iPhone
